QuestionText: What's the one pitch you wish you could throw?
Who's the toughest pitcher you've ever faced?
What did you think of Eric the first time you met him?

Hot take: Is the shift good or bad for baseball?
What's the most embarrassing moment on the field?
AnswerText: Oh man, I once tripped rounding second base on a routine double. The whole stadium saw it. Eric still brings it up every time we hang out.

QuestionText: Do you watch your own highlights?
AnswerText: All the time! Especially the ones Eric edits. He makes me look way cooler than I am.

QuestionText: If you could play any other sport professionally what would it be?

What's the funniest thing Eric has ever done on camera with you?
AnswerText: He tried to hit my fastball in a cage session and fell down. Literally fell. We had to stop filming because everyone was laughing so hard.
